body.title: UnseenUniversity Phase 4 — the rest (Discord, SWADL, browser-use, installer)
body.text:
# D-adc-phase-4-2026-04-27
**title:** UnseenUniversity Phase 4 — the rest (Discord, SWADL, browser-use, installer)
**date:** 2026-04-27
**status:** open
**spawned_tickets:** T-adc-discord-device, T-adc-discord-shim, T-adc-swadl-device, T-adc-swadl-shim, T-adc-browser-use-eval-spike, T-adc-browser-use-device, T-adc-browser-use-shim, T-adc-installer-design-call

## Decision narrative

Phase 4 ships remaining devices: Discord (push-only v1, reconnect semantics), SWADL (stub pending API stabilization), browser-use (gated on evaluation spike). Installer bootstrap paradox resolved with a final design call after the Phase 1 portable-bootstrap result informs the gap analysis.

## Rollup

**Closed at:** 2026-04-29T22:58:24.690897+00:00
**Ticket count:** 8 (all closed)

### Shipped via
- T-adc-browser-use-eval-spike (S) — UnseenUniversity: browser-use evaluation spike — answer 3 shim questions  `done` — GO verdict. lab/spikes/browser-use-eval.md: interface stable (pin 0.12.x), needs own shim (BaseShim maps: start=launch Chrome CDP, stop=kill, self_test=navigate), restart=kill+reopen (storage_state op
- T-adc-browser-use-device (M) — UnseenUniversity: browser-use device (gated on eval spike go verdict)  `done` — BrowserUseDevice + BrowserUseShim shipped; 69/69 tests pass
- T-adc-browser-use-shim (M) — UnseenUniversity: browser-use shim (gated on device ticket)  `done` — BrowserUseShim shipped; self_test fast-paths without Chrome launch
- T-adc-discord-device (M) — UnseenUniversity: Discord device — push-only v1, restart=reconnect  `done` — DiscordBotDevice implemented in UnseenUniversity/devices/discord_bot/device.py — push-only v1, health via discord.log recency. 114 contract tests pass. Commit 3850610.
- T-adc-swadl-device (M) — UnseenUniversity: SWADL device stub — spec at implementation time  `done` — SwadlDevice stub implemented in UnseenUniversity/devices/swadl/device.py — health=degraded with clear message. Contract tests pass.
- T-adc-discord-shim (M) — UnseenUniversity: Discord shim — token management, reconnect backoff, self-test  `done` — DiscordBotShim implemented in UnseenUniversity/devices/discord_bot/shim.py — no-op Phase 4 proxy; self_test verifies DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN + discord.log recency. Commit 3850610.
- T-adc-swadl-shim (M) — UnseenUniversity: SWADL shim stub — spec at implementation time  `done` — SwadlShim stub implemented in UnseenUniversity/devices/swadl/shim.py. self_test returns passed=False with explanation. Commit 3850610.
- T-adc-installer-design-call (S) — UnseenUniversity: installer bootstrap paradox — design call and agentctl init full spec  `done` — pe_chain autonomous: pass

_Generated by cc_queue.py _decision_rollup. File-stub until T-decisions-into-palace-subtree moves rollups into the memory palace._

## Provenance
Absorbed from the TheIgors.archive lineage 2026-06-28 (D-all-generations-consolidation-2026-06-28). Historical record; original status: open.
